message:
chore: sync issue tracker and update dependency lockfile

- Updated .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue metadata
- Cargo.lock regenerated with dependency tree changes
  (248 insertions / 52 deletions reflecting version bumps
  and transitive dependency updates)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
